GET /accounts/{account_id}/images/v2/sou.description:
Get the current progress of a migration including counts of scanned, imported,
skipped, and errored objects.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful

isAccurate.description: Whether the counts are accurate or estimated.

scannedCount.description: Total number of objects scanned in the source.

skippedConflictCount.description: Objects skipped due to existing images at destination.

skippedExcludedContentTypeCount.description: Objects skipped because their content type was excluded.

skippedInvalidMediaCount.description: Objects skipped because the media could not be decoded.

skippedInvalidNameCount.description: Objects skipped because their name is not valid.

skippedOversizeCount.description: Objects skipped because they exceed the size limit.

skippedStorageClassCount.description: Objects skipped due to unsupported storage class.

skippedUnsupportedContentTypeCount.description: Objects skipped because their content type is not supported.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/images/v2/so.description:
Create a new migration from an existing source. The migration will import
objects from the source bucket into Cloudflare Images.

excludedContentTypes.description: Content types to skip during migration.

items.description: A MIME type that can be excluded from migration.

pathPrefix.description: Prefix to prepend to image custom IDs.

rootDirectory.description: Only import objects under this prefix in the source bucket.

sourceId.description: The identifier of the source to migrate from.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful

id.description: The identifier of the created migration.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/images/v2/so.description:
Create a new migration source by providing storage credentials. The service
will verify connectivity to the bucket before accepting the source.

account.description: Account identifier for the bucket (required for R2 vendor).

bucket.description: The name of the storage bucket.

name.description: A human-readable name for the source.

secret.description: Storage credentials for accessing the bucket. Shape depends on vendor.

vendor.description: The cloud storage vendor of the source bucket.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful

id.description: The identifier of the created source.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/images/v2/so.description:
Verify connectivity to a storage bucket before creating a source. Returns
connectivity status without persisting any state.

account.description: Account identifier for the bucket (required for R2 vendor).

bucket.description: The name of the storage bucket.

region.description: The region hint for the bucket (S3 only).

secret.description: Storage credentials for accessing the bucket.

vendor.description: The cloud storage vendor of the source bucket.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful

code.description: Machine-readable error code if connectivity failed.

reason.description: Human-readable error description if connectivity failed.
